title: Enna Vilai Azhagae Song Lyrics Kadhalar Dhinam
stanzas:
Enna Vilai Azhagae Song Lyrics Kadhalar Dinam
#ARRahman #UnniMenon #Vaali

Enna vilai azhagae
Enna vilai azhagae
sonna vilaikku vaanga varuven
vilai uyir endraalum tharuven
indha azhagai kandu
viyandhu pogiren

Enna vilai azhagae
sonna vilaikku vaanga varuven
vilai uyir endraalum tharuven
indha azhagai kandu
viyandhu pogiren

oru mozhi illaamal
oru mozhi illaamal
mounam aagiren (2)

Padaithaan iraivan unaiye
malaithaan udane avane
azhagai padaikkum
thiramai mulukka
unnudan saarndhadhu
en vizhi serndhadhu

vidiya vidya madiyil
kidakkum
pon veenai un meni
meettatum en meni

viraivinil vandhu kalandhidu
viral pada mella kanindhidu
udal mattum ingu kidakkudhu
udan vandhu neeyum uyir kodu

pallavan sirpigal andru
panniya sirppathil ondru
pennena vandhadhu indru
silaiye... (2)
undhan azhagukillai eedu.

Enna vilai azhagae
sonna vilaikku vaanga varuven
vilai uyir endraalum tharuven
indha azhagai kandu
viyandhu pogiren

oru mozhi illaamal
oru mozhi illaamal
mounam aagiren

Uyire unaiye ninaindhu
vizhi neer mazhaiyil nenaindhu

imaiyil irukkum iravu urakkam
kanvitu poyaachu
karanam neeyaachu
unavu erikka
ninaivu kodhikka
aaraadha nenjaachu
aahaaram nanjaachu

dhinam dhinam unnai ninaikiren
thurumbena udal ilaikiren
uyir kondu varum padhumaiye
unnai vida illai pudhumaiye.

un pugal vaiyamum solla
sitrena vaasallil mella
chithiram vetkudhu mella
uyire... (2)
unnai naanum serum naalthaan

Enna vilai azhagae
Enna vilai azhagae
sonna vilaikku vaanga varuven
vilai uyir endraalum tharuven
indha azhagai kandu
viyandhu pogiren

oru mozhi illaamal
oru mozhi illaamal
mounam aagiren (3)

seo.title: Enna Vilai Azhagae Song Lyrics Kadhalar Dhinam
seo.description: Full Enna Vilai Azhagae songs lyrics, Kadhalar Dhinam Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vaali, Music: AR Rahman, Singer(s): Unni Menon.
seo.keywords: Vaali, Kadhalar Dhinam, AR Rahman, Unni Menon, Enna Vilai Azhagae full lyrics, Kadhalar Dhinam songs lyrics, Enna Vilai Azhagae lyrics snippets, Enna Vilai Azhagae WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Enna Vilai Azhagae lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Enna Vilai Azhagae expresses the feelings of love and admiration, highlighting the beauty of the beloved.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kadhalar Dhinam, this song reflects the protagonist's deep affection and longing for his love interest.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Unni Menon and composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 9, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enna Vilai Azhagae, the protagonist expresses his admiration and love for his beloved, encapsulating the essence of romance. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of longing and beauty, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As part of the movie Kadhalar Dhinam, it enhances the emotional depth of the narrative, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. This timeless classic continues to touch hearts with its enchanting composition and soulful rendition.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enna Vilai Azhagae is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully rendered by Unni Menon. With AR Rahman's enchanting composition and Vaali's poignant lyrics, this song from the film Kadhalar Dhinam resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Dive into this timeless classic that continues to evoke emotions even decades after its release.
stanzaMeanings: What price is this beauty? If I say it, I will come to take it. If life is given, I will give it. Seeing this beauty, I am overwhelmed.
I have become silent without a word (2)
What price is this beauty? If I say it, I will come to take it. If life is given, I will give it. Seeing this beauty, I am overwhelmed.
I have become silent without a word (2)
God created you, and immediately he created beauty. The talent to create this beauty has come together with your eyes.
The golden veena will rest in the light, and your beauty will meet my beauty.
In the realm of freedom, the fingers blend, and the body alone rests here. You too come and give life.
The sculptures made by the sculptor have come together today, one of them is a woman... (2) Your beauty is not a burden.
What price is this beauty? If I say it, I will come to take it. If life is given, I will give it. Seeing this beauty, I am overwhelmed.
I have become silent without a word (2)
My life, I think of you, in the rain of tears, I remember.
The night that is in the future has gone away, the reason is you, the food that is eaten brings memories, the heart is filled with longing.
Every day, I think of you, I feel your presence in my body, there is no wonder greater than you.
Your entrance is like a painting slowly being drawn in the doorway, slowly my life... (2) I will also join you on that day.
What price is this beauty? If I say it, I will come to take it. If life is given, I will give it. Seeing this beauty, I am overwhelmed.
I have become silent without a word (3)
